markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the new content strategy and Education Hub plan.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Freeze Canceled:** The planned freeze is off. Publishing will continue as usual, preventing a projected traffic dip.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [**Education Hub Pivot:** The project is now an internal Abnormal build, aligned with the larger "Web 3.0" initiative. GrowthX will provide best practices, not wireframes.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [**Dual-Lane Strategy:** Content will be produced in two tracks: an "Education Lane" (15 articles/week) for broad, brand-agnostic topics and a "Blog Lane" (5 articles/week) for campaign-aligned content.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
  - [**Content Reactivation:** 5–8 high-traffic, brand-irrelevant articles will be republished after removing all Abnormal mentions, using an "edu" tag for future migration to the Hub.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)

## Topics

### Content Freeze Canceled

  - [The planned content freeze is canceled due to a project pivot.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Publishing will continue uninterrupted, avoiding a significant traffic dip.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [**Action:** Jo will add a 30/90-day Looker traffic snapshot to the shared spreadsheet to establish a baseline for measuring future performance.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)

### Education Hub Pivot

  - [The Education Hub project is now an internal Abnormal build, aligned with the "Web 3.0" initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The internal team must use a rigid component library and design standards.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [**New Plan:** GrowthX will provide a list of best practices for the internal team to implement.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**Timeline:** The timeline is TBD, pending the internal pivot.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [**Interim Solution:** Publish new content with an "edu" tag. This content will remain unnavigable until the Hub is ready, then be migrated automatically.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)

### Content Reactivation

  - [**Opportunity:** Republish 5–8 high-traffic articles that were deactivated for being off-brand.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
    1.  [Confirm articles were unpublished, not deleted.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
    2.  [Remove all Abnormal product mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
    3.  [Republish under original URLs to preserve SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
    4.  [Tag with "edu" for future migration to the Hub.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)

### New Content Strategy & Forecast

  - [A new forecast is in progress for a dual-lane strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [**Education Lane (15 articles/week):**](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
      - [**Focus:** Broad cybersecurity topics (6M+ monthly search volume).](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
      - [**Content:** Brand-agnostic, light review path.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Drive volume, feed UFDL for ad targeting, and build topical authority.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [**Blog Lane (5 articles/week):**](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
      - [**Focus:** Campaign-aligned content.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
      - [**Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
        1.  [**Education Hub:** Primary focus.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
        2.  [**AI Phishing Coach:** Mid-funnel cluster to support the new product.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
        3.  [**Competitive Defense:** Bottom-of-funnel listicles (slow lane, requires PMM/legal review).](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
        4.  [**Public Sector Growth:** Funnel high-level traffic to new landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
        5.  [**Geo-Expansion:** Target India (no localization).](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [**Quarterly Refresh Program:** A new process to audit and refresh top-performing content, preventing decay.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)

### LLM Visibility & CheckDot

  - [**Rationale:** LLM visibility is a key channel for high-intent users, even if it drives direct traffic rather than citation clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [**CheckDot:** GrowthX's in-house LLM visibility tool.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
      - [**Differentiator:** Uses an industry benchmark and context-aware prompts tailored to Abnormal's ICP, unlike generic tools like Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
      - [**Status:** Account setup is in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
      - [Add 30/90-day Looker traffic snapshot to the shared spreadsheet.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
      - [Share the new content strategy document with Abdallah.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
      - [Coordinate with Suleiman to republish the 5–8 deactivated articles.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
      - [Provide best practices for the Education Hub to Meaghan.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
      - [Provide updates on the CheckDot account setup.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [**Meaghan:**](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
      - [Provide an updated timeline for the internal Education Hub build.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [**Emily:**](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
      - [Confirm with Callie if the 5–8 articles were unpublished or deleted.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
      - [Tag Yaroslav for content reviews during her Feb 10–26 absence.](https://fathom.video/share/L76x6-BCy1Wk9scx1xES1XgavqG8ZYg5?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
